Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment to transition to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all cases that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Accepted + Wait - User compared to when followed by Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Elapsed time from case start to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the next occurrence of Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in high-frequency variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total waiting time accumulated in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before transitioning to any Acceptance-related activity (e.g., Accepted + In Progress, Accepted + Assigned)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment to be resolved into Accepted + In Progress in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that include multiple re-queues versus those with a single occurrence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between consecutive occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in looping variants that later execute Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Total time from first Queued + Awaiting Assignment to final Completed + In Call in multi-loop variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it directly precedes Accepted + Wait - Vendor versus when it precedes Accepted + Wait - Customer
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases that end with Completed + Resolved versus those that end with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs
